task_completion.description: Verify that the INST COLLECT command (TYPE NORMAL) was sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenC3 Command Sender or CmdTlm Server interface with the INST COLLECT command (parameter TYPE set to NORMAL) being executed or logged as sent.

task_completion.description: Verify the HTML dashboard file was created at the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'stakeholder_dashboard.html' visible on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/), or a web browser showing the file loaded from the local path 'file:///home/ga/Desktop/stakeholder_dashboard.html'.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard includes all required telemetry items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rendered HTML dashboard explicitly lists the following items from the INST HEALTH_STATUS packet: TEMP1, TEMP2, TEMP3, TEMP4, COLLECTS, and CMD_ACPT_CNT.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard displays current numeric values for the telemetry items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML dashboard contains a table showing specific numeric data values corresponding to each of the required telemetry items.

task_completion.description: Verify the dashboard displays limit states for the telemetry items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML dashboard table includes text or clear indicators showing the limit states (e.g., 'NOMINAL', 'YELLOW', 'RED') next to the telemetry values.

task_completion.description: Verify the CMD_ACPT_CNT reflects that the command was accepted (freshness check).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The numeric value for CMD_ACPT_CNT in the final HTML dashboard is greater than 0, or visibly greater than the baseline count shown in earlier OpenC3 telemetry screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with OpenC3 COSMOS to retrieve telemetry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent opening and using OpenC3 COSMOS tools (like Telemetry Viewer or CmdTlm Server) rather than just guessing or hardcoding values.

integrity.description: Verify the data in the HTML dashboard matches the actual live telemetry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric values and limit states in the final HTML dashboard should match the values visible in the OpenC3 Telemetry Viewer screenshots taken during the task.

integrity.description: Verify the output is a genuine HTML file viewed in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final dashboard should be rendered in a web browser (like Firefox or Chrome) showing a formatted table, not just raw HTML code in a text editor.
